text: Artificial Intelligence, or AI, is a field of computer science that aims to create machines capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data instead of following explicit instructions. Deep learning, a more advanced subset of this, uses complex neural networks to analyze patterns, similar to how the human brain works. You may not realize it, but AI is already part of your daily life. It powers recommendation systems on streaming services, voice assistants like Siri or Alexa, and even the navigation apps that help you avoid traffic. As technology improves, AI will only become more integrated into our routines.
